g.text: MCP Client sends a request to the Lambda Function URL (HTTPS). authorization_type=NONE means no auth, and CORS allows all origins.
The invocation, permitted by the resource policies (InvokeFunctionUrl / InvokeFunction), assumes the execution role and starts the MCP server (nodejs20.x).
Lambda writes execution logs to CloudWatch Logs (/aws/lambda/<function name>). Retention is managed via log_retention_days.
